benefits.description: Initial 8 lb drop first week, then minimal loss for ~3 weeks, followed by steady 1.5-2 lbs per week loss.

protocol_notes: User reports first week drop is mostly water and gut content, not fat. Describes body adjustment period to new appetite signals. Emphasizes importance of consistent weigh-in timing (morning, fasted, after bathroom) to account for 2-3 lb daily water fluctuations.
